name: Check the possibility of editing data in search field in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Check the possibility of editing data in search field in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter book "Book" and save it as 'word'
And  I edit data by adding "hello" in search field and save it as 'newWord'
Then  Placeholder contains 'newWord' text in search field

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check the possibility of editing data in search field in LYRASIS

labels.value: Check the possibility of editing data in search field in LYRASIS
